raw_text:
HARIS        MOHAMMED                                      
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
          Trivandrum | harissaif2003@gmail.com | +91 8921785723| linkedin.com/in/harissmohammed
                                                                                  
     PROFESSIONAL      SUMMARY                                                    
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
     Data Science graduate with hands-on experience in Machine Learning, Data Analysis, and Python-based model
     development. Skilled in SQL, Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn, and Data Visualization tools like Power BI and Tableau.
     Seeking an entry-level Data Analyst / AI-ML Engineer role to apply data-driven problem-solving skills.
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
     INTERNSHIP    / EXPERIENCE                                                   
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
     Data Science & AI - Scope India Technopark Trivandrum | (Ongoing)            
                                                                                  
     July 2025–                                                                   
                                                                                  
     • Developed and analysed datasets using Python, Pandas, and NumPy for data cleaning,
      preprocessing, and exploratory data analysis.                               
                                                                                  
     • Built and evaluated machine learning models using algorithms such as Linear Regression,
      Logistic Regression, and Decision Trees.                                    
                                                                                  
     • Worked on data visualization using Matplotlib and Seaborn to present insights clearly.
                                                                                  
     • Implemented end-to-end data science projects, including data collection, feature engineering,
      model training, and performance evaluation.                                 
                                                                                  
     • Collaborated with team members to interpret results and improve model accuracy and efficiency
                                                                                  
     EDUCATION                                                                    
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
     BSc Computer Science                                                         
     Bachelor of Science in Computer Science                                      
                                                                                  
     University of Kerala, Trivandrum                        Graduated: 2025      
                                                                                  
     Higher Secondary Education                                                   
     Higher Secondary Education from Govt V&HSS Vellanad(2020-2022)               
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
     Secondary School Examination                                                 
     Secondary School Examination from Lourdes Mount Higher Secondary School Vattappara(2020)
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
     SKILLS                                                                       
                                                                                  
     Programming Languages : Python, Html, Css, JavaScript                        
                                                                                  
     Data Analytics Tools : Pandas, NumPy, Scikit-learn                           
                                                                                  
     Data Science : Machine Learning                                              
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  

                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
     Python Frameworks : Django                                                   
                                                                                  
     Database : Sql(Mysql, Sqlite)                                                
                                                                                  
     Data Visualisation : Power BI, Tableau, Matplotlib, Seaborn                  
                                                                                  
     PROJECTS                                                                     
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
     Major Project – Forensic AI (2024–2025)                                      
                                                                                  
     • Developed an AI-based forensic analysis system                             
                                                                                  
     • Used Python for data processing and analysis                               
                                                                                  
     • Focused on pattern detection and investigation support                     
     CERTIFICATIONS                                                               
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
     •  Professional Certificate in Data Science & AI – Scope India, Technopark Trivandrum
                                                                                  
     Declaration                                                                  
                                                                                  
     I hereby declare that the information furnished above is true and correct to the best of my
     knowledge and belief.                                                        
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                            Haris Mohammed

    Date / Place of birth

    1989/20/03, New York

    Nationality                                                                   
    American                 Employment   History

    Driving license                                                               
                             October 2023 — Present                               
    Full                                                                          
                             Blink Fitness is an inclusive fitness brand with state-of-the-art gyms in more than
    Skills                   90 locations across the US. As the Personal Trainer, my core activities include:
    Knowledge in Nutrition                                                        
                              • Preparing comprehensive diet plans based on clients’ weight and health
                                goals.                                            
    Proficient at sales                                                           
                              • Assisting with marketing efforts to retain existing clients.
                              • Leading fitness groups of 10-20 clients three times per week.
    Self-motivated                                                                
                              • Developing new fitness workshops. Increased new memberships by 32% by
    Organized                   end of 2017.                                      
                              • Tracking client progress using specialized software to generate accurate
    Energetic and upbeat        reports.                                          
    Effective communicator   Personal Trainer, Astor Place, New York              
                             April 2022 — September 2024                          
                                                                                  
                             NYSC Flagship Astor Place is a high-end health club in New York. As the Personal
                             Trainer, my core activities included:                
                              • Designing and implementing tailored fitness programs for upscale clients.
                              • Training 70 clients per month where 85% reached their fitness goals within
                                six weeks.                                        
                              • Advising individual clients on health, nutrition, and lifestyle changes.
                                                                                  
                              • Providing clients with safe and effective exercises they can perform at
                                home.                                             
                              • Demonstrating exercises for all clients to ensure proper technique.
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  

                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                                                                                  
                             Personal Fitness Trainer, Crunch Fitness, New York   
                             February 2021 — March 2022                           
                                                                                  
                             Crunch is a health club chain that leads the industry in fusing fitness and
                             entertainment. As the Personal Trainer, my core activities included:
                              • Designing one-on-one nutritional plans for clients. More than 87% achieved
                                their weight loss goals.                          
                              • Introducing new gym members to personal training packages and
                                conducting tours of the health club.              
                                                                                  
                              • Ensuring proper use and cleanliness of gym equipment.
                              • Participating in PT Department meetings and promotional events.
                                                                                  
                             Education

                             ACE Certified Group Fitness Instructor               
                                                                                  
                             March 2020                                           
                                                                                  
                             ACE Certified Personal Trainer                       
                                                                                  
                             January 2019
